affirmative_question_headers.header: Which experience makes you happier?

Which experience do you find least distressful?
What stirs the most genuine inspiration in you?
Which experience would leave you least grief-stricken?

Which experience would thrill you the most?
Which experience would bring you the least anguish?

Which experience would leave you least forlorn?

Which experience would leave you feeling least stressed?
Which of these would leave you feeling most elated?
Which experience would bring the least desolation?
When things are not going well, which experience would you most yearn for?
Which experience would you feel least bereft about?
Given these alternatives, which sits most easily with you?
Which experience would you most cherish?
Which experience would you find least disquieting?

What would you genuinely go out of your way to seek?
Which experience would you find least wretched?

Which of these would you find yourself drawn back to again and again?
Which experience would fill you with the least torment?
What fills you with the most genuine sense of wonder?
Which experience would give you the least sadness?
